nodes.label: Canonical Data Schema Ownership
nodes.source_location: ControlP owns its canonical data schema (lib/schema.ts)

nodes.label: Role Adapter Pattern
nodes.source_location: Registry tools are replaceable adapters behind role interfaces (lib/adapters/)

nodes.label: Local-First Web-Ready Boundary
nodes.source_location: Local-first with a web-ready boundary: all data access is server-side through adapters

nodes.label: NOTE: This file should not be edited
nodes.norm_label: note: this file should not be edited

nodes.label: vaultSignals
nodes.summary: Reactive signal bus that carries voice data (level + 16-band spectrum) from audio pipeline to visual layer. Reusable by future TTS response path.

nodes.label: Spherical Equalizer
nodes.summary: ParticleCore shader animates particle field as a spherical audio equalizer: 16 frequency bands (85 Hz–4 kHz) map to horizontal rings by height, bass at bottom, treble at top. Each ring pulses with its band amplitude.

nodes.label: Orb Voice Glow
nodes.summary: ProjectNodes orbs emit a warm-color halo glow proportional to the current voice level from vaultSignals, without jitter or positional change. Ready to mirror TTS output when assistant responds.

nodes.label: useMicLevel hook
nodes.summary: React hook that opens getUserMedia, runs an AnalyserNode to compute RMS level and 16-band FFT, and publishes both to vaultSignals. Includes granular microphone permission diagnostics.

nodes.label: Voice Command Router
nodes.summary: Rule-based router that matches spoken transcripts: switch 3D formation, open project by name, show queue, and dictation phrases (anota/tarea/recuerda) → enqueued as voice intents for future operational agenda.

nodes.label: Voice Intent
nodes.summary: Intent source type 'voice' added to the intent queue. Dictation commands enqueue with source:voice for future processing by the operational agenda (V1.4.1).

nodes.label: Audio I/O Panel
nodes.summary: Push-to-talk panel (button or V key) with live speech transcript (Web Speech API es-CO), microphone permission status, and diagnostic messages. Registered in the panel registry as VoicePanel.

nodes.label: SCHEMA_VERSION 2
nodes.summary: Canonical data contract bumped to version 2 with V1.4, adding voice intent support (source: voice) to the intent queue schema.

links.source_location: Swapping a tool = writing one adapter
canonical schema is pure JSON (future API wire format)
